_comment: Binds the committed confidential SP1 guest ELFs to the verifying keys they must be deployed with. Two ELFs from one `cargo prove build`: elf/cxfer-guest (the settle guest → program_vkey, immutable PROGRAM_VKEY) and elf/reflection-prover (the Bitcoin-state relay prover → bitcoin_relay_vkey, immutable BITCOIN_RELAY_VKEY). verify-vkey-pin.sh asserts both sha256s on every PR. A rebuild that changes either ELF MUST regenerate its vkey + update this file IN THE SAME COMMIT, then redeploy ConfidentialPool with the new immutable vkey — otherwise every settle (resp. every attestBitcoinStateProven) reverts. Each vkey is the key a REAL Groth16 proof of THAT ELF verifies against on-chain (test/ConfidentialSwapProofReal.t.sol, test/ConfidentialReflectionProofReal.t.sol). The two share cxfer-core, so a cxfer-core change rebuilds BOTH — committing the ELFs is what keeps the prover box running the pinned bytes rather than a drifting rebuild.
guest_state: Settle guest (cxfer-guest): gen-1 op set + OP_SWAP + OP_LP_ADD/REMOVE. Swap/LP amounts are now bound by an OPENING SIGMA (Schnorr proof of knowledge of the note blinding for the public amount, challenge binds the whole intent) instead of the raw blinding — so the settle prover verifies the openings WITHOUT learning r and cannot spend the input or redirect the output (the swap/LP analog of the kernel hiding transfer blindings; Parity F1). ~603K cycles/swap, ~1.01M/LP-add. Reflection prover (reflection-prover): the PINNED ELF here (0x0050d656) is the relay-ANCHOR model — folds witnessed Bitcoin pool effects into BitcoinReflectionPublicValues and commits bitcoinPrevHash+bitcoinTipHash so the pool pins the proof's prev/tip to HEADER_RELAY.tip() within a finality window (F1/F2/F3 closed — anchor / self-declared difficulty / confirmation). Both rebuilt from the shared cxfer-core (verify_opening_sigma + intent_context added): settle 0x00cc4e72->0x00d0fb85, reflection 0x005cfda3->0x00f96088->0x0050d656; all 5 real-proof fixtures re-proven against these ELFs in one change. F4 (spent-set completeness) is NOT yet in this pinned ELF: the full-scan guest (walks every tx of every block, tx-set merkle-complete, every vin against the handed live UTXO set via scan_tx_spends/LiveUtxoSet/ScanReflection — full-scan genesis digest 0xec719b81 three-way pinned Rust==JS==contract) is implemented in source + JS indexer + the real signet-307547 input fixture, but its GPU re-prove is PENDING and will REPLACE 0x0050d656 + refresh reflection_groth16.json + drop the deploy ACK F4 caveat. BITCOIN_RELAY_VKEY stays 0 on the Ethereum-only deploy; activating cross-chain on 0x0050d656 carries the F4 witnessed-omission caveat until the full-scan re-prove lands.
